title: JGWAS - Just Gimme Worldgen and Structures
description: A simple server side worldgen pack for vanilla clients to play on
body: **This modpack requires [Better End Cities Vanilla](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-end-cities-vanilla/files/6587089) which is not available on Modrinth** A server side only modpack for players who don't want to go through the effort of downloading mods on their clients. This is only to be installed on a server, and anyone with a vanilla client can join. ### Includes: * Biome & terrain shape mods for all three dimensions * Structure mods for all three dimensions * Gravestones * Custom datapack to iron out incompatibilities and tweak balancing ### Recommended Optional Downloads For Clients: [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons/version/2.3.4-b-1.21.4): A good way to see far away terrain without having a high server render distance. Works best when installed on both server and client. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/version/mc1.21.4-0.6.13-fabric): Helps prevent distant horizons from dropping your FPS too much.
